title: Caddy handle_path Directive and Its Impact on Upstream URL Construction

summary: This concept explains the behavior of Caddy's `handle_path` directive, which strips the matched path prefix before proxying requests upstream. This behavior affects applications that build absolute URLs based on the incoming request path...
